personal.name: Joakim Moléni
personal.title: Software Engineer — High-Reliability Systems & Core-to-Cloud Architecture

variants.title: Core Systems CV
variants.description: Prioritises mainframe, reliability and transaction-heavy work.

variants.title: Modern Backend CV
variants.description: Highlights backend, integrations and modern service delivery.

variants.title: Platform & Delivery CV

profile: Software Engineer focused on high-reliability transaction systems within core banking environments. Experienced in developing and maintaining mission-critical flows on IBM z/OS (COBOL, HLASM, IMS) and integrating them with modern service architectures (Node.js, REST APIs, AWS). Strong systems-level perspective shaped by leadership background and operational accountability.

highlights: Development and maintenance of high-availability core banking systems on IBM z/OS
Implementation of transaction logic in COBOL and HLASM within regulated financial infrastructure
Integration between mainframe transaction flows and distributed service layers via REST-based interfaces
Participation in system design discussions and reliability improvements across critical financial processes
Backend development within banking systems supporting core financial processes
System integration and operational support across Linux and distributed environments
Work spanning APIs, databases and service-layer integrations
Designed and implemented REST APIs in Node.js
Cloud deployment and infrastructure setup in AWS environments
Contributed to architectural decisions in early-stage product development
Web application development with REST integrations and SQL-backed data models
Deployment and maintenance in Linux-based cloud environments
Senior roles across renewable energy, events and technical operations
Leadership responsibility, project management and system-oriented decision making
Operational accountability influencing current approach to reliability and system design

projects.name: Portfolio & Resume Builder
projects.description: Personal engineering portfolio with integrated version-controlled resume generator and print-optimized PDF export pipeline.
